limitation.authoritative_source: RIID-4900 live Figma Plugin API page.children.length for page 42:3014 plus previously captured non_ui_top_level_inventory, registered node-id evidence in this manifest, and direct node lookup for 236:33845 and 236:33847
limitation.rule: a timeout is supporting evidence only and must not rewrite expected_pages downward, remove page 42:3014, remove onboarding inventory, or mark onboarding generated paths unresolved; direct registered-node lookup may be used as fallback evidence for onboarding API Generated annotations when full page traversal times out, and a documented known_inventory_count may lag expected_pages.child_count only for the explicitly unresolved extra top-level node on page 42:3014.
